home.eyebrow: A youth career platform for Azerbaijan
home.title: Keep internships, trainee tracks, and junior roles in one clean place.
home.copy: CareerApple combines verified employer profiles with fresh openings from sources like LinkedIn and HelloJob into a feed cleaned up for early-career talent. Move through the auto-swiping banners, filter fast, and reach relevant roles sooner.
home.featuredJobsTitle: Newest internship openings in a continuous banner flow
home.featuredCompaniesTitle: Verified employers with active youth-role hiring
home.platformSignalsTitle: The public surface stays focused on job discovery
home.ctaTitle: Verified employer onboarding and demo flow are handled separately.
home.ctaCopy: The public surface is limited to job discovery. Employer onboarding, company verification, and scrape review are handled in a separate internal flow.
home.feature1Copy: Search by city, level, work model, and keywords. Internship and junior roles stay easy to track.
home.feature2Copy: Browse selected vacancies in a 16:9 banner stream and jump straight into the listing detail page.
home.feature3Copy: A lime verification badge appears next to each company name. It signals that the profile has been reviewed by the platform.
home.feature4Copy: Youth-role openings from LinkedIn and local career platforms pass through a source-tracked ingest flow before entering the feed.

jobsPage.title: Filter open roles for early-career talent and apply faster
jobsPage.copy: Use the filters below to view internships, trainee tracks, junior roles, and graduate-friendly openings in one place.
jobsPage.newInternshipsTitle: New internship openings for young talent
jobsPage.featuredEmployersTitle: See the market pulse through an active employer cloud
jobsPage.emptyTitle: No matching roles were found for these filters
jobsPage.emptyCopy: Relax the filters and try again, or change your keyword.

companiesPage.title: Verified employer profiles and teams actively hiring youth talent
companiesPage.copy: Employer profiles shown on CareerApple are selected for active vacancy flow, clear brand signals, and fit for early-career candidates.
companiesPage.filteredCopy: This list has been automatically filtered from the sector menu in the navbar.
companiesPage.emptyTitle: No companies are visible for this category right now
companiesPage.emptyCopy: Choose another sector or return to the full companies list.

companyPage.overviewPlaceholder: This block is reserved for a dynamic company overview that will later be filled with Wikipedia API and AI enrichment data.
companyPage.focusTitle: Where this employer is most active right now
companyPage.youthOfferTitle: What the company offers for interns and junior candidates
companyPage.jobsTitle: Roles currently open across the {name} team
companyPage.vibeSectionTitle: See the team’s rhythm, tools, and perk map at a glance
companyPage.techStackTitle: The tools shaping the team’s daily flow
companyPage.cultureTitle: Signals that make the day-to-day feel better
companyPage.vibeTitle: Three signals that define the culture best
companyPage.emptyTitle: There is no active role visible for this company right now
companyPage.emptyCopy: When a new opening is added, it will appear on this page.

jobDetail.whatYouWillDo: What you will do in this role
jobDetail.aiPromptCopy: Paste this into ChatGPT to get a tighter, more role-specific cover letter draft.
jobDetail.aiPromptHint: The prompt is prefilled with the current job title, summary, and key requirements.

outbound.title: You are being redirected to {company}'s official page...
outbound.copy: We are tracking this handoff and sending you to the official source through a controlled redirect layer.
outbound.fallbackCta: If you are not redirected automatically, click here
outbound.invalidTitle: This outbound link is not valid
outbound.invalidCopy: The URL could not be verified or does not use a safe format. Return to jobs and start the redirect again.

playbook.title: Keep your first-job game plan in sharp, practical, high-signal cards
playbook.copy: Fast micro-guides for interviews, CVs, portfolios, outreach, and the moments that decide momentum.
playbook.gridTitle: The most useful playbook cards this week
playbook.ctaTitle: Read the playbook, then move into the right role
playbook.ctaCopy: Every card is written to lead into action: either sharpen the application or choose the next job with more conviction.

employersPage.title: Build a sharper hiring experience for early-career talent.
employersPage.copy: This page outlines the employer-side surface: verified onboarding, internship-first placement, and a more focused presentation logic for a younger audience.
employersPage.feature1Copy: Label internships, trainee tracks, and junior roles separately to improve candidate relevance during discovery.
employersPage.feature2Copy: Use a structured job data model to measure clicks, saves, and apply intent clearly.
employersPage.feature3Copy: Company profiles and listings pass through review and verification before they appear in the public feed.
employersPage.ctaTitle: Employer onboarding is currently handled through a separate review flow.
employersPage.ctaCopy: Public visitors only see the job feed. Company profiles, verification, and source matching continue in the internal management surface.

footer.introTitle: The early-career platform for internships and first jobs
footer.introCopy: CareerApple brings internship, trainee, and junior openings together with verified employer profiles and a source-tracked scraping pipeline built for young talent.

info.platformFlowTitle: How this content is used in the product
info.platformFlowCopy1: The public surface keeps job discovery, featured banners, and career resources open for early-career users.
info.platformFlowCopy2: Company profiles and scrape ingestion only reach the public feed after the review flow.
info.nextStepCopy: CareerApple resource pages are not only informational. The goal is to direct users quickly toward the most relevant job, employer, or support flow.
